form.title: Book your appointment
form.subtitle: Book online in simple steps.
form.anyProfessionalHint: We'll assign the professional with a free schedule
form.pickDateHint: Pick a date to see availability.
form.noSlots: No slots available for this professional or day. Try a different date.
form.notesPlaceholder: Preferences, allergies or any comment for the professional...
form.bookingError: Error completing your booking. Please try again.

success.title: Booking confirmed!
success.headline: Booking Completed!
success.fallbackMessage: Your appointment has been processed. Contact the business to confirm.
success.emailNote: {{message}} We sent you an email and we'll contact you if there are any reschedules.

errors.load: Could not load the booking page.
errors.submit: Could not create the booking. Try again.
errors.noSlots: No time slots available for this date.

public.businessClosed: This business is currently not accepting online bookings.

settings.title: Online Booking Settings
settings.subtitle: Enable public online booking for your clients and customize booking conditions.
settings.enableLinkHint: If disabled, your clients won't be able to book appointments autonomously.
settings.yourLinkHint: Share this link on your social networks (Instagram, WhatsApp) to start booking appointments.
settings.downpaymentSubtitle: Require an advance payment to secure the appointment and reduce no-shows.
settings.simActiveText: You are currently using Mercado Pago simulation. To receive real payments in your salon's bank account, go to the Integrations Center and connect your account.
settings.realActiveText: Your business can now process live downpayments and receive real automated payments.
settings.billingSubtitle: Configure your bank transfer details and Mercado Pago link. These will be automatically used in the schedule to generate WhatsApp checkout messages when finalizing appointments.
settings.mpLinkHint: Optional. Mercado Pago quick checkout link.
settings.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Welcome to Aura Studio. Book your appointment by choosing the professional and time of your preference.
settings.successMessagePlaceholder: Your reservation has been confirmed successfully!
